mapper.update: UPDATE user_quota SET interview_quota = interview_quota - 1, daily_interview_used = daily_interview_used + 1, total_interview_used = total_interview_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND interview_quota > 0 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET resume_quota = resume_quota - 1, daily_resume_used = daily_resume_used + 1, total_resume_used = total_resume_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resume_quota > 0 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_interview_used = daily_interview_used + 1, total_interview_used = total_interview_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_interview_used < #{dailyLimit} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_resume_used = daily_resume_used + 1, total_resume_used = total_resume_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_resume_used < #{dailyLimit} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET resume_quota = resume_quota + CASE WHEN daily_resume_used > #{dailyLimit} OR #{dailyLimit} = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, daily_resume_used = GREATEST(daily_resume_used - 1, 0), total_resume_used = GREATEST(total_resume_used - 1, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_polish_used = daily_polish_used + 1, cycle_polish_used = cycle_polish_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_polish_used < #{dailyLimit} AND (#{cycleLimit} = 0 OR cycle_polish_used < #{cycleLimit}) AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_jd_match_used = daily_jd_match_used + 1, cycle_jd_match_used = cycle_jd_match_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_jd_match_used < #{dailyLimit} AND (#{cycleLimit} = 0 OR cycle_jd_match_used < #{cycleLimit}) AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_template_used = daily_template_used + 1, cycle_template_used = cycle_template_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_template_used < #{dailyLimit} AND (#{cycleLimit} = 0 OR cycle_template_used < #{cycleLimit}) AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_offer_used = daily_offer_used + 1, cycle_offer_used = cycle_offer_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_offer_used < #{dailyLimit} AND (#{cycleLimit} = 0 OR cycle_offer_used < #{cycleLimit}) AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE user_quota SET free_polish_left = free_polish_left - 1, daily_polish_used = daily_polish_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND free_polish_left > 0 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET free_jd_match_left = free_jd_match_left - 1, daily_jd_match_used = daily_jd_match_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND free_jd_match_left > 0 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET free_template_left = free_template_left - 1, daily_template_used = daily_template_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND free_template_left > 0 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE user_quota SET free_offer_left = free_offer_left - 1, daily_offer_used = daily_offer_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND free_offer_left > 0 AND is_deleted = 0
